violations.text: The establishment's menu is lacking an allergen warning for consumers. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) Reach in freezer door observed with tape 2) The door of the small refrigeration unit on the cook line was not sealing/fully closing 3) The right handle on the faucet of the restroom hand wash sink did not dispense water Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The plumbing under the three bay sink was in poor repair (active leak observed). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The floor in the kitchen area was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The ceiling vents had dust 2) The ceiling tiles above/near the cook and prep line had dust and other debris Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The ceiling in the cook and prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The establishment's menu is lacking an allergen warning for consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Equipment such as slicer pieces and large can opener were observed on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing and must not be obstructed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Meatballs and sauce, were only reheated to 65 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) Reach in freezer door observed with tape 2) The door of the small refrigeration unit on the cook line was not sealing/fully closing 3) The right handle on the faucet of the restroom hand wash sink did not dispense water New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The plumbing under the three bay sink was in poor repair (active leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The condensate from the prep unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The receptacle in the employee's restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The floor in the kitchen area was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The hood ventilation system had dust and other debris 2) The ceiling vents had dust 3) The ceiling tiles above/near the cook and prep line had dust and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The presence of flying insects is not controlled. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated pest control is going to be treating establishment for insects. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Pepsi fridge was observed not fully shutting. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The grease trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
A tiny fly was observed in a container of alfredo sauce. Sauce was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC contacted dish machine company. Until dishwasher is serviced, establishment to use 3-bay to sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by multiple flies observed. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. The small sauce refrigerator was observed not tightly closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The grease trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
